// Role permissions
export const ROLES={admin:{label:"Admin",canAdd:true,canEdit:true,canDelete:true,canPrint:true,canViewUsers:true,canViewAudit:true,canViewNotifications:true,canViewReports:true},standard_admin:{label:"Standard Admin",canAdd:true,canEdit:true,canDelete:false,canPrint:true,canViewUsers:false,canViewAudit:false,canViewNotifications:true,canViewReports:true},data_entry:{label:"Data Entry",canAdd:true,canEdit:true,canDelete:false,canPrint:false,canViewUsers:false,canViewAudit:false,canViewNotifications:true,canViewReports:true},view:{label:"View Only",canAdd:false,canEdit:false,canDelete:false,canPrint:false,canViewUsers:false,canViewAudit:false,canViewNotifications:false,canViewReports:false}};export function getPermissions(role){return ROLES[role]||ROLES.view;}
